outputs.description: All gateways that were available and attempted for the client location. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.AuthMethod Authentication method used for the GlobalProtect connection.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.AttemptedGateways

outputs.description: Identifies how the GlobalProtect app connected to the the Gateway. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.ConnectionErrorID Enumeration integer assigned to the connection_error field value.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.ConnectMethod

outputs.description: Error information for unsuccessful connection. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.CountOfRepeats Number of sessions with same Source IP, Destination IP, Application, and Content/Threat Type seen for the summary interval.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.ConnectionErrorValue

outputs.description: The ID that uniquely identifies the Cortex Data Lake instance which received this log record. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.EndpointDeviceName Name of the device that the user used for the connection.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.CustomerID

outputs.description: GlobalProtect client version number. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.EndpointOSType OS type of the endpoint on which the GlobalProtect client is deployed.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.EndpointGPVersion

outputs.description: OS version of the endpoint on which the GlobalProtect client is deployed. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.EndpointSN ID that uniquely identifies the endpoint on which the GlobalProtect client is deployed.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.EndpointOSVersion

outputs.description: The name of the event. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.Gateway Gateway for the connection.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.EventID

outputs.description: Priority of the gateway. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.GatewaySelectionType Gateway selection method i.e., automatic, preferred, or manual.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.GatewayPriority

outputs.description: Location of the GlobalProtect gateway. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.HostID Unique identifier GlobalProtect has assigned to the host.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.GPGatewayLocation

outputs.description: Indicates whether this log data is available in multiple locations, such as from Strata Logging Service as well as from an on-premise log collector. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.IsExported Indicates if this log was exported from the firewall using the firewall's log export function.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.IsDuplicateLog

outputs.description: Internal use field that indicates if the log is being forwarded. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.IsPrismaBranch Internal use field. If set to 1, the log was generated on a cloud-based firewall. If 0, the firewall was running on-premise.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.IsForwarded

outputs.description: Internal use field. If set to 1, the log record was generated using a cloud-based GlobalProtect instance. If 0, GlobalProtect was hosted on-premise. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.LogSource Identifies the origin of the data.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.IsPrismaMobile

outputs.description: ID that uniquely identifies the source of the log. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.LogSourceName Name of the source of the log.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.LogSourceID

outputs.description: Time the log was received in Strata Logging Service XSOAR Connector. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.LogType Identifies the log type.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.LogTime

outputs.description: Duration for which the connected user was logged on. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.Opaque Additional information regarding the event.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.LoginDuration

outputs.description: Panorama Serial associated with SLS. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.PlatformType The platform type.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.PanoramaSN

outputs.description: GlobalProtect portal or gateway that the user connected to. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.PrivateIPv4 Private IP address (v4) of the user that connected.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.Portal

outputs.description: Private IP address (v6) of the user that connected. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.ProjectName Project name.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.PrivateIPv6

outputs.description: Public IP address (v4) of the user that connected. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.PublicIPv6 Public IP address (v6) of the user that connected.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.PublicIPv4

outputs.description: Quarantine reason. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.SequenceNo The log entry identifier, which is incremented sequentially.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.QuarantineReason

outputs.description: Region of the gateway (or user) that connected. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.SourceUser The username that connected.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.SourceRegion

outputs.description: Domain to which the source user belongs. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.SourceUserName The source user username.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.SourceUserDomain

outputs.description: Unique identifier assigned to the source user. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.SSLResponseTime SSL response time in milliseconds.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.SourceUserUUID

outputs.description: Name of the stage in the GlobalProtect connection workflow. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.EventStatus The status (success or failure) of the event.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.Stage

outputs.description: The log subtype. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.TimeGenerated Time when the log was generated on the firewall's data plane.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.Subtype

outputs.description: Tunnel type i.e., SSL or VPN. SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.VendorName The vendor that produced the data.
outputs.name: SLS.Logging.GlobalProtect.TunnelType
